completion_summary: Completed exact 100,000-step repaired-source SAC Train/Dev development on flow optimization with five periodic model/replay-buffer checkpoints and full hashes. Final Dev: 20/20 episodes complete, zero invalid actions and domain failures, mean episode-best 0.0097586. Standard replay: 10/10 exact, 100% completion, zero invalid actions, mean best including failures 0.0064995. All preregistered development gates pass, justifying multi-seed development but not formal ranking. Learning curve peaked at 80k (0.0237818) and regressed at 100k (0.0105517), so next protocol must evaluate checkpoint instability. Fixed and transparently documented replay-buffer artifact classification. 17 relevant tests plus Ruff/mypy pass.
notes: SAC-only 100k development stage selected by the frozen 20k gate; periodic checkpoints every 20k, no Bench access, no formal ranking.
scope: Correct actual RL environment-step accounting, add periodic checkpoint provenance, and execute the repaired-source 100k SAC Train/Dev stage
